metadata.description: Two peer Cursor plugins for structured engineering: plan and verify your specs, generate and update your evals.

plugins.name: zoto-spec-system
plugins.description: Decompose complex initiatives into reviewable specs, judge them independently, then execute with adversarial verification. Live execution status aggregation and no-restart token-budget configuration.

plugins.name: zoto-eval-system
plugins.description: Stamp static (pytest) and LLM (@cursor/sdk) eval suites side-by-side, detect drift when AI primitives change and update evals with user confirmation, compare runs across models on /canvas. Surgical update on git diff, sovereign user-authored cases.

plugins.name: zoto-cursor-top
plugins.description: Live updating htop-style CLI that shows every Cursor agent on this machine, with expandable parent-to-subagent hierarchy and scrolling log tails
